'''povaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:libertarianish|libertarianish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:libertarianish|libertarianish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| povaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:povarithi|povarithi]] || [[word:povariji|povariji]] || [[word:povarishi|povarishi]] || [[word:povariki|povariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:povaruthuthu|povaruthuthu]] || [[word:povarujuju|povarujuju]] || [[word:povarushushu|povarushushu]] || [[word:povarukuku|povarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:povaruthu|povaruthu]] || [[word:povaruju|povaruju]] || [[word:povarushu|povarushu]] || [[word:povaruku|povaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:povarufthuf|povarufthuf]] || [[word:povarufjuf|povarufjuf]] || [[word:povarufshuf|povarufshuf]] || [[word:povarufkuf|povarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:povarethe|povarethe]] || [[word:povareje|povareje]] || [[word:povareshe|povareshe]] || [[word:povareke|povareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:povarothotho|povarothotho]] || [[word:povarojojo|povarojojo]] || [[word:povaroshosho|povaroshosho]] || [[word:povarokoko|povarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:povarotho|povarotho]] || [[word:povarojo|povarojo]] || [[word:povarosho|povarosho]] || [[word:povaroko|povaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:povarofthof|povarofthof]] || [[word:povarofjof|povarofjof]] || [[word:povarofshof|povarofshof]] || [[word:povarofkof|povarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:povarÃŸfthÃŸf|povarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfjÃŸf|povarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfshÃŸf|povarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfkÃŸf|povarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:povarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|povarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|povarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|povarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|povarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:povarÃŸfthÃŸf|povarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfjÃŸf|povarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfshÃŸf|povarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfkÃŸf|povarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:povarÃŸfthÃŸf|povarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfjÃŸf|povarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfshÃŸf|povarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:povarÃŸfkÃŸf|povarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:povarÃḊthÃḊ|povarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:povarÃḊjÃḊ|povarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:povarÃḊshÃḊ|povarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:povarÃḊkÃḊ|povarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:povarathatha|povarathatha]] || [[word:povarajaja|povarajaja]] || [[word:povarashasha|povarashasha]] || [[word:povarakaka|povarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:povaratha|povaratha]] || [[word:povaraja|povaraja]] || [[word:povarasha|povarasha]] || [[word:povaraka|povaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:povarafthaf|povarafthaf]] || [[word:povarafjaf|povarafjaf]] || [[word:povarafshaf|povarafshaf]] || [[word:povarafkaf|povarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:povarasha|povarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:povarshÃḋsha|povarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povarosha|povarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povarmusha|povarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:povaryasha|povaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovarnkshÃḋsha|gopovarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovarnkrosha|gopovarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovarnkmusha|gopovarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovarnkyasha|gopovarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:povavarasha|povavarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:povavarshÃḋsha|povavarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povavarosha|povavarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povavarmusha|povavarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:povavaryasha|povavaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovavarnkshÃḋsha|gopovavarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovavarnkrosha|gopovavarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovavarnkmusha|gopovavarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovavarnkyasha|gopovavarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pevÃḊrasha|pevÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pevÃḊrshÃḋsha|pevÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pevÃḊrosha|pevÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pevÃḊrmusha|pevÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pevÃḊryasha|pevÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopevÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gopevÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopevÃḊrnkrosha|gopevÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopevÃḊrnkmusha|gopevÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopevÃḊrnkyasha|gopevÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:povfarasha|povfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:povfarshÃḋsha|povfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:povfarosha|povfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:povfarmusha|povfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:povfaryasha|povfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopovfarnkshÃḋsha|gopovfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopovfarnkrosha|gopovfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopovfarnkmusha|gopovfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopovfarnkyasha|gopovfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
